description: Remove the SkipToContent component from the app. Delete the component file and remove all imports/usages from layout.tsx.
steps: In apps/web/app/layout.tsx, remove the import line: import { SkipToContent } from '@/components/ui/skip-to-content';
In apps/web/app/layout.tsx, remove the <SkipToContent /> JSX usage from the body/Providers section
acceptance_criteria: No references to SkipToContent remain in the codebase (excluding tsconfig.tsbuildinfo)
verification: Run grep -r 'SkipToContent\|skip-to-content' apps/web/ --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' to confirm zero matches
Run cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit to confirm TypeScript compilation succeeds
